headline: O’Reilly Automotive (ORLY) Q1 Revenue Rises 10% to $4.56B on Strong Comp Sales
summary: O’Reilly Automotive Inc. (NASDAQ:ORLY) is one of the best large cap stocks to buy under $1000. On April 29, O’Reilly Automotive reported total revenue of $4.56 billion for Q1 2026, representing a 10% increase from $4.14 billion in the same period one year ago. This growth was highlighted by an 8.1% increase in comparable store […]
